title: Andru the Man
overview: Andruman lives in a colony of orphans, transgender, people and the poor. Small jobs keep him alive and afloat. Helping people and other living things around Andru moved on. An act of innocence on Andru's part disturbs the peace of the place when divisive forces in the society manipulates the situation.
